claim_boundary: Real public external sources were used where available. Full external validation remains blocked until the actual MIDI-B DICOM corpus, answer-key database, reviewer identities, authorization, and signing/native-runner resources are supplied.

official_midi_validator.dependencies: Installed in D:/CodexExternal/venvs/midi-validation-311 from the CBIIT requirements.txt file.
official_midi_validator.smoke_test: Imported run_validation, run_reports, and run_dciodvfy under Python 3.11.9.

unresolved: DICOM corpus not downloaded from the .tcia manifests
Faspex answer-key SQLite database not downloaded

remaining_blockers: MIDI-B DICOM corpus and answer-key SQLite databases were not downloaded. Public TCIA manifests and mapping CSVs were acquired and hashed, but they are not substitutes for the corpus and answer database.
Synapse challenge remains closed and any restricted/test-phase access must come from authorized project-owner credentials or access grants.
RSNA CTP was downloaded, extracted, and made command-discoverable, but it still does not present a verified runnable directory anonymizer pipeline; Runner.jar -help throws NullPointerException.
Two independent blinded human reviewers and an adjudicator were not supplied.
Institutional endpoints, authorization letters, native GitHub runner provenance, and code-signing/notarization credentials were not supplied.

rsna_dat.ctp_probe: CTP command wrapper is discoverable for preflight. Runner.jar -help still throws NullPointerException before help output; CTP is acquired but not configured/executed.
rsna_dat.tool: RSNA DicomAnonymizerTool DAT.jar from legacy RSNA downloads

sources.name: TCIA MIDI-B-Test-MIDI-B-Validation collection
sources.used_for: Identified the public MIDI-B data source. The validation download was observed as 7.63 GB, which exceeds local free disk space during this run.

sources.name: MIDI resources paper
sources.used_for: Confirmed MIDI dataset scope: validation/test subjects, instances, synthetic PHI/PII, answer keys, validation script, and TCIA DOI/resource availability.

sources.name: Synapse MIDI-B challenge
sources.used_for: Confirmed challenge status, model-to-data nature, and challenge data folder metadata.

sources.name: Orthanc Docker documentation
sources.used_for: Confirmed official Docker-based Orthanc operation and ports.

sources.name: Docker Hub orthancteam/orthanc
sources.used_for: Confirmed orthancteam/orthanc published image component information.

sources.name: RSNA DicomAnonymizerTool wiki
sources.used_for: Confirmed DAT command-line usage: java -jar DAT.jar with -in and -out arguments.

sources.name: RSNA legacy mirc.rsna.org downloads repository
sources.used_for: Downloaded and hashed RSNA legacy installer JARs without redistributing them in public artifacts.

sources.name: RSNA Anonymizer PyPI
sources.used_for: Confirmed package metadata, release date, Python >=3.12,<3.13 requirement, hashes, and provenance metadata.

sources.name: RSNA Anonymizer source metadata
sources.used_for: Confirmed package version 18.0.7, Python >=3.12,<3.13 requirement, and rsna-anonymizer console entry point.

sources.name: NBIA Toolkit documentation
sources.used_for: Confirmed programmatic NBIA/TCIA access paths and Guest/OAuth access distinction.

sources.name: TCIA/NBIA Data Retriever CLI documentation
sources.used_for: Confirmed that .tcia manifests are handled by the NBIA/TCIA Data Retriever command-line workflow.

sources.name: CBIIT MIDI validation script
sources.used_for: Cloned the public official validation script source and installed its Python dependencies.

sources.name: IBM Aspera Faspex package download API documentation
sources.used_for: Confirmed Faspex package downloads require a bearer token and package transfer-spec request before Aspera transfer.
